method: research-lookup + web literature cross-check + PubMed E-utilities (notebooklm_pubmed_verify.py; MCP pubmed server errored)

status_legend.LITERATURE_PARTIAL: Primary literature supports a related metric, not the exact YouTube/LifeHarness claim
status_legend.LITERATURE_UNSUPPORTED: No primary source found for the exact numeric claim
status_legend.LITERATURE_CONTRADICTED: Independent sources disagree materially with the video statistic

claims.youtube_claim: LifeHarness +54% / +72% AlfWorld improvement from harness alone
claims.summary: AlfWorld literature reports ~51% absolute success-rate gain (Few-Shot Butlers, EMNLP 2021), not a LifeHarness replication in this repo.

sources.title: Language Models are Few-Shot Butlers
sources.metric: 51% absolute improvement in AlfWorld success rate vs prior methods

claims.implementation_gate: GO — repo LifeHarness mapping is procedural; do not cite +54% as measured here

claims.youtube_claim: 80% less compute/tokens vs brute-force RAG (neuro-symbolic multi-hop)
claims.summary: Graph-RAG compression papers report ~60% context/token reduction (graph-walk), not 80%. SymRAG reports large processing-time savings via routing, not an 80% token figure.

sources.title: The Reasoning Bottleneck in Graph-RAG (graph-walk compression)
Efficient Neuro-Symbolic RAG through Adaptive Query Routing (SymRAG)
sources.metric: 169–1151% processing-time increase when adaptive routing disabled

claims.implementation_gate: GO — local TGS pilot is implementation-only; do not market 80% savings without benchmark

claims.youtube_claim: 4700 new agent skills added to global repositories daily
claims.summary: No peer-reviewed or primary registry documents 4700 skills/day. Ecosystem trackers cite ~1670 new tools/day (all categories) or tens of thousands of skills total, not 4700/day.

sources.title: Skillful.sh State of the AI Agent Ecosystem (May 2026)

claims.implementation_gate: GO — SkillRAE routing does not depend on this statistic

procedural_closure.note: External metrics discharged via web literature + PubMed E-utilities formal pass (2026-05-30). Exact YouTube numbers must not appear as verified in PRD or harness docs.
